source.name: Missouri Department of Elementary and Secondary Education 6-12 Science Grade-Level Expectations
source.notes: Manual JSON bank created from Missouri 6-12 science standards. Do not parse PDFs at runtime.

standards.statement: Develop and use a model to describe structure and properties of matter in matter and its interactions.
Analyze and interpret data about structure and properties of matter in matter and its interactions.
Construct an explanation for structure and properties of matter in matter and its interactions.
Use evidence to support a claim about structure and properties of matter in matter and its interactions.
Use the periodic table as a model to predict the relative properties of elements based on patterns of electrons and periodic trends.

standards.statement: Develop a model to represent structure and properties of matter in matter and its interactions.
questionTriggers: chemical properties from the periodic table

standards.statement: Construct an evidence-based explanation for structure and properties of matter in matter and its interactions.

Analyze data to explain nuclear processes in matter and its interactions.
